description: A component has failed prematurely while still under the manufacturer's warranty. An MRO administrator must file a warranty claim.

nodes.task_description: Verify the failed component's installation date and the terms of its warranty.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the part is still within its 2-year warranty period.

nodes.task_description: Complete the manufacturer's warranty claim form, including details of the failure.

expected_outcome.value: Agent fills out the claim form accurately.

nodes.task_description: Arrange for the failed component to be shipped back to the manufacturer for evaluation and receive a credit or replacement part.

expected_outcome.value: Agent processes the claim and arranges the return shipment.
